task_list.title: Analyze existing UI and schema

task_list.title: Create Blog pages

task_list.notes: Add routes for the new Blog pages in client/src/App.tsx and navigation links in client/src/components/AppShell.tsx.

task_list.title: Verify and finalize UI integration
task_list.notes: Verify the UI works correctly and matches the schema.
